meta.title: How many stealth aircraft are flying today?
meta.description:
We tend to talk about stealth aircraft individually, but there's real value in looking at volume. Today, there are more F-35s flying than all of the rest of the world's stealth aircraft COMBINED. 

#shorts #airpower #f35 #j20 #su57 #f22 #b2spirit #stealth #stealthfighter #stealthbomber
